Class EvaluationTool

java.lang.Object
entityClasses.EvaluationTool
public class EvaluationTool extends Object

Title: EvaluationTool

Description: Core logic for computing student grades and managing database operations for the Evaluation tool.

Version:
1.00 2026-04-05
Author:
Jonathan Stark

    • EvaluationTool

      public EvaluationTool(database.Database database)

  • Method Details

    • computeLetterGrade

      public static String computeLetterGrade(int percentScore)

      Method: computeLetterGrade()

      Description: Converts a numeric percent score into a letter grade

      Parameters:
      percentScore - the numeric score as a percentage
      Returns:
      the letter grade as a string.

    • compute

      public static EvaluationTool.EvaluationRow compute(int studentID, String[] definedParams, Double[] paramWeights, double[] scores)

      Method: compute()

      Description: Computes a student's evaluation result by summing raw scores and weights, calculating a percentage, rounding to a number grade, and mapping to a letter grade

      Parameters:
      definedParams - the rubric parameter names
      paramWeights - the maximum weight of 100
      scores - the student's actual scores for each param
      studentName - the name of the student being evaluated
      Returns:
      a new EvaluationRow containing the student's name, params, weights, computed percentage, rounded number grade, and letter grade
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any array is null or if the arrays do not all have the same length

    • save

      public void save(EvaluationTool.EvaluationRow row)

      Method: save()

      Description: saves an EvaluationRow to the database.

      Parameters:
      row - the EvaluationRow to save

    • findAll

      public List<EvaluationTool.EvaluationRow> findAll() throws SQLException

      Method: findAll()

      Description: finds all calculated evaluation in the database.

      Returns:
      a List of all the evaluations in an list.
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • findById

      public EvaluationTool.EvaluationRow findById(int studentID) throws SQLException

      Method: findById()

      Description: Searches the evaluation table for one row by studentID.

      Parameters:
      studentID - the student id to search for
      Returns:
      the matching EvaluationRow if found, or null if no row exists
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs

    • readRow

      private static EvaluationTool.EvaluationRow readRow(ResultSet rs) throws SQLException

      Method: readRow()

      Description: sets all the values found in the DB to an EvaluationRow.

      Parameters:
      rs - the value needing to be set.
      Returns:
      a new EvaluationRow populated with the data from the current values.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs or a column name cannot be found

    • toStringArray

      private static String[] toStringArray(Array sqlArray) throws SQLException

      Method: toStringArray()

      Description: Converts a DB Array into a Java String array

      Parameters:
      sqlArray - the DB Array to convert, or null
      Returns:
      a String[] from the DB Array, or null if sqlArray is null
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs

    • toDoubleArray

      private static Double[] toDoubleArray(Array sqlArray) throws SQLException

      Method: toDoubleArray()

      Description: Converts a DB Array into a Double array

      Parameters:
      sqlArray - the DB Array to convert, or null
      Returns:
      a Double[] from the DB Array, or null if sqlArray is null
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs

    • validateEvaluationRubric

      public static void validateEvaluationRubric(String[] definedParams, Double[] paramWeights)

      Method: validateEvaluationRubric

      Description: Ensures assessment parameters are all defined with non-blank names, that each row has a corresponding weight, and that weights sum to rubric total so the rubric matches a standard percentage breakdown.

      Parameters:
      definedParams - parallel criterion labels
      paramWeights - parallel weights as percent points; must total 100
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any name is missing, any weight is null/invalid, lengths differ, or the total is not 100%
